since_last: 25% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.36%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 25% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC +0.82% · Gold +0.39% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 25% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.36%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.36%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -2.02%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SYNA is the standout at +8.26%
cards.body: Leaders: SYNA +8.26%, SAP +1.40%, NOW +1.37%, PLTR +1.33%, DV +1.18%. Laggards: CEVA -5.11%, MU -4.46%, BABA -3.90%, SMCI -3.25%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.44% at $150.79
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.44% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
